_description: Machine-readable session state for agent handoff. Read AGENT_HANDOFF.md for full context.

phase1_training.notes: May 29 run with flow_count=21. Valid weights. June 8 re-run with flow_count=300 was broken (flat negative rewards) — those weights are in june8_backup and must NOT be used.

phase2_evaluation.previous_run_reason: flow_count=300 in config vs flow_count=21 at training time; resulted in 64-94% pkt_loss for all variants including EVPN_SP baseline

bugs_fixed.description: ospf_step always buffered on congestion regardless of traffic_mode. MADDPG step() immediately drops in flow mode. Fix: ospf_step now uses immediate-drop in flow mode to match MADDPG semantics. Before fix: EVPN_SP showed 0% loss (unfair). After fix: EVPN_SP faces same drop penalty as MADDPG.

flow_count was 300 (June 7 commit) but models were trained with flow_count=21 (May 29). Phase 2 ran on invalid config producing all-bad results. Fixed by restoring flow_count=21, flow_duration_steps=12.

invariants: ospf_step() must use immediate-drop in flow mode (current code is correct)
Do NOT restore june8_backup weights — they are from a broken training run
Do NOT change flow_count back to 300

key_commands.run_phase2: ssh pedroamaral@10.26.110.14 "cd maddpg-adversarial-experiments && bash run_phase.sh paper1"
key_commands.run_phase3: ssh pedroamaral@10.26.110.14 "cd maddpg-adversarial-experiments && bash run_phase.sh paper2"
